disclaimer.acknowledgement: I understand this is decision-support, not a legal determination, and I'll confirm any classification with a qualified advisor before I rely on it.

ab5.tooltip: California AB5 watchlist: this engagement performs work in California, where the stricter ABC test applies. Review with your advisor — this is a flag, not a determination.

section530.label: §530 relief
section530.tooltip: May be eligible for §530 safe-harbor relief. Confirm reporting consistency, substantive consistency, and a reasonable basis with your advisor.

citations.federal: IRS common-law test (Rev. Rul. 87-41): behavioral control, financial control, and the relationship of the parties.
citations.section530: §530 of the Revenue Act of 1978 — safe-harbor relief where reporting consistency, substantive consistency, and a reasonable basis are met.

UsClassification.adviserVerify: Figures, forms, and classifications shown here need verification by a jurisdiction-specific legal or tax advisor before you rely on them.
